legal.aboutUs_p1: PlayVault was born with the idea of creating a space where board game, video game, book and collectible enthusiasts could find everything they are looking for in one place.
legal.aboutUs_p2: We are a team passionate about leisure and pop culture, committed to offering the best selection of products and a simple, enjoyable shopping experience.
legal.aboutUs_p3: Although PlayVault is currently an academic prototype developed at IES Sotero Hernández, it represents the vision of what a real store focused on this sector could be.
legal.contact_p1: For any query, suggestion or incident you can contact us through the following channels:
legal.faq_a1: No. PlayVault is an academic prototype developed as an end-of-cycle project. No real payments are processed and no physical shipments are made.
legal.faq_a2: Yes, you can register and explore all the features of the platform. The data you enter will be stored in the prototype database but will not be used for any commercial purpose.
legal.faq_q3: Are the products and prices real?
legal.faq_a3: No. All products, prices and descriptions are fictional and have been created solely to demonstrate the platform's features.
legal.faq_q4: Can I add products to the cart and place orders?
legal.faq_a4: Yes, all features are implemented and operational. You can add products to your cart, manage your cart and simulate orders. No operation has any real economic effect.
legal.faq_q5: Who can I contact if I have questions about the project?
legal.faq_a5: You can contact the developer via email at info@playvault.es or directly through the IES Sotero Hernández school.
legal.legalNotice_p1: In compliance with the information duty set out in article 10 of Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce, the following data is provided to the user:
legal.legalNotice_p2: Access and use of this website implies acceptance of the conditions set out in this legal notice. PlayVault reserves the right to modify these conditions at any time.
legal.privacy_p1: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Organic Law 3/2018 on Personal Data Protection (LOPDGDD), PlayVault informs about the processing of personal data collected through this website.
legal.purpose_p1: The data is used exclusively for managing the user account and purchase history within the platform. As this is an academic prototype, no data is shared with third parties or used for commercial purposes.
legal.rights_p1: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by sending an email to privacidad@playvault.es.
legal.cookies_p1: This website uses its own technical cookies necessary for the platform to function. No tracking, advertising or third-party analytics cookies are used.
legal.terms_p1: Access and navigation through PlayVault implies acceptance of these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with them, we ask that you do not use the platform.
legal.usage_p1: The user agrees to make proper use of the platform, refraining from using it for illegal purposes or against good faith. The use of bots, scrapers or automated tools to access content is prohibited.
legal.ip_p1: All PlayVault content (design, code, texts, images) is the property of its authors and is protected by intellectual property legislation. Total or partial reproduction without express authorisation is prohibited.
legal.liability_p1: As this is an academic prototype, PlayVault assumes no responsibility for any damages or losses that may arise from the use of the platform.
legal.prototype_p1: PlayVault is an end-of-cycle project developed as an integrated assignment for the Higher Degree in Web Application Development (DAW) at IES Sotero Hernández, 2025/2026.
legal.prototype_p2: All data appearing on this website (products, prices, users, orders, legal information, company data) is completely fictional and has been created solely for demonstration purposes.
legal.prototype_p3: This platform is not a real store. No real payments are processed, no physical products are shipped and no banking data of any kind is stored. Any operation carried out on this website has no commercial or legal validity.
legal.prototype_p4: If you arrived here thinking you could buy something, thank you for the compliment! But you will have to look elsewhere.
legal.shipping_warning: Remember: this is a fictional store. No real shipments are made.
legal.delivery_2: Canary Islands and Balearic Islands: 5-7 working days
legal.shippingCost_p1: Shipping is free for all orders placed on PlayVault.
legal.returns_p1: You have 14 calendar days from receipt of the order to request a return without needing to give a reason. The product must be in perfect condition and in its original packaging.
legal.warranty_p1: All products sold on PlayVault have legal conformity warranty in accordance with Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007 of 16 November.
legal.warranty_2: Manufacturing defects: free replacement or repair
legal.warranty_3: Damage due to misuse: not covered by warranty
legal.warranty_contact: To exercise the warranty, contact us at garantia@playvault.es indicating the order number and a description of the problem.
legal.payment_warning: This platform does not process real payments. No banking data is requested or stored.
legal.payment_p1: In a real store, PlayVault would accept the following payment methods:
legal.payment_p2: All payments would be protected by SSL encryption and comply with PSD2 strong authentication regulations.
